Class CsvAdoptionRequestRepository

java.lang.Object
shelter.repository.csv.CsvAdoptionRequestRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
AdoptionRequestRepository
public class CsvAdoptionRequestRepository extends Object implements AdoptionRequestRepository
CSV-backed implementation of AdoptionRequestRepository that persists adoption request records to a flat file named adoption-requests.csv. The repository requires injected AnimalRepository and AdopterRepository instances to reconstruct full object graphs when loading from CSV. Records are kept in memory and flushed to disk on every mutation.

  • Constructor Details

    • CsvAdoptionRequestRepository

      public CsvAdoptionRequestRepository(String dataDir, AnimalRepository animalRepository, AdopterRepository adopterRepository)
      Constructs a new CsvAdoptionRequestRepository backed by the given data directory. The animalRepository and adopterRepository are used to resolve full objects when loading adoption requests from CSV rows. If the CSV file does not yet exist it is created with just the header row.
      Parameters:
      dataDir - the path to the directory for the CSV file; must not be null or blank
      animalRepository - used to look up animals by ID during CSV deserialization; must not be null
      adopterRepository - used to look up adopters by ID during CSV deserialization; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null or dataDir is blank
      RuntimeException - if the directory cannot be created or the file cannot be read

  • Method Details

    • save

      public void save(AdoptionRequest request)
      Persists a new adoption request or overwrites the existing record with the same ID. Callers are responsible for ensuring the request is fully constructed before saving.
      Specified by:
      save in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      request - the adoption request to save; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if request is null

    • findById

      public Optional<AdoptionRequest> findById(String id)
      Returns the adoption request with the given ID, or an empty optional if not found. Does not throw if the ID is absent — callers decide how to handle the missing case.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier to look up; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the request, or empty if not found
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null or blank

    • findAll

      public List<AdoptionRequest> findAll()
      Returns all adoption requests currently persisted in the store. Returns an empty list if no requests have been saved.
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Returns:
      a list of all adoption requests

    • findByAdopterId

      public List<AdoptionRequest> findByAdopterId(String adopterId)
      Returns all adoption requests associated with the given adopter ID. Returns an empty list if the adopter has no requests on record.
      Specified by:
      findByAdopterId in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      adopterId - the adopter ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests for the specified adopter
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if adopterId is null or blank

    • findByAnimalId

      public List<AdoptionRequest> findByAnimalId(String animalId)
      Returns all adoption requests targeting the given animal ID. Returns an empty list if no requests exist for that animal.
      Specified by:
      findByAnimalId in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      animalId - the animal ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests for the specified animal
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if animalId is null or blank

    • findByShelterId

      public List<AdoptionRequest> findByShelterId(String shelterId)
      Returns all adoption requests for animals currently housed in the given shelter. Shelter membership is determined by the animal's shelterId field. Returns an empty list if no requests exist for animals in that shelter. Shelter membership is determined by comparing the given shelterId to each request's animal.getShelterId().
      Specified by:
      findByShelterId in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the shelter ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests for animals in the specified shelter
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if shelterId is null or blank

    • findByStatus

      public List<AdoptionRequest> findByStatus(RequestStatus status)
      Returns all adoption requests with the given status. Returns an empty list if no requests match the given status.
      Specified by:
      findByStatus in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      status - the request status to filter by; must not be null
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests with the specified status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if status is null

    • findByAdopterIdAndStatus

      public List<AdoptionRequest> findByAdopterIdAndStatus(String adopterId, RequestStatus status)
      Returns all adoption requests associated with the given adopter ID and status. Returns an empty list if no requests match the given criteria.
      Specified by:
      findByAdopterIdAndStatus in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      adopterId - the adopter ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      status - the request status to filter by; must not be null
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests for the specified adopter with the specified status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if adopterId is null or blank, or status is null

    • findByShelterIdAndStatus

      public List<AdoptionRequest> findByShelterIdAndStatus(String shelterId, RequestStatus status)
      Returns all adoption requests for animals in the given shelter that match the given status. Combines shelter and status filtering in one query to avoid secondary filtering in the service layer. Returns an empty list if no matching requests are found.
      Specified by:
      findByShelterIdAndStatus in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the shelter ID to filter by; must not be null or blank
      status - the request status to filter by; must not be null
      Returns:
      a list of adoption requests for the specified shelter with the specified status
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if shelterId is null or blank, or status is null

    • delete

      public void delete(String id)
      Removes the adoption request record with the given ID from the store. Does nothing if no request with that ID exists.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface AdoptionRequestRepository
      Parameters:
      id - the unique identifier of the request to delete; must not be null or blank
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if id is null or blank
